ms_camera_model.filter_sensor package

Submodules

ms_camera_model.filter_sensor.filter_sensor module

Multispectral Camera Model - Filters and Sensors

  • Description: Dataclasses and their methods for filters and sensors

  • Author: Tomas Vacek

class ms_camera_model.filter_sensor.filter_sensor.FilterSensorUnit(filter_spec: FilterSpecs, sensor_spec: SensorSpecs)[source]

Bases: object

Combination of filter and sensor

calculate_combined_attenuation() → None[source]

Calculate combined attenuation of filter and sensor based on their transmission and qe (quantum efficiency) curve

combined_attenuation: ndarray
filter_spec: FilterSpecs
classmethod from_excel(filename_filter: str, filename_sensor: str) → FilterSensorUnit[source]

Load filter transmission and sensor spectral sensitivity from Excel file

Parameters:

  • filename_filter – Filename or path to the filter xlsx file

  • filename_sensor – Filename or path to the sensor xlsx file

interpolate_to_hs_data(hs_band_centers: list[float] | None) → FilterSensorUnit[source]

Interpolate the provided filter and sensor data to hyperspectral data

sensor_spec: SensorSpecs
class ms_camera_model.filter_sensor.filter_sensor.FilterSpecs(filter_transmission: ndarray, name: str = 'Generic', supplier: str = 'Generic', band_center: int = 0, band_width: int = 0)[source]
